pr.title: Record: Sliding Window + FP16 Embed + 10L + Muon WD + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.1748)

output.summary: Sliding-window eval plus FP16 tied embeddings and Muon WD let a 10-layer stack run with overtone init and sigmoid residual mixing.
techniques: Sliding-window stride-64 eval for 960+ context scoring
FP16 tied embeddings with Muon weight decay to support a 10-layer stack
Overtone spectral init combined with sigmoid-scheduled residual mixing
